portfolio.description: End-to-end implementation of Information Security Management System, achieving ISO 27001:2022 certification across all digital banking infrastructure.
Comprehensive IT governance audit covering network infrastructure, data center operations, and cybersecurity posture across 12 regional offices.
Quality Management System implementation and certification support for the Directorate General of Taxes, improving service delivery standards nationwide.
Delivered a 3-month executive training program on IT Risk Management and Cybersecurity Awareness for 200+ senior managers across business units.
Compliance Management System design and implementation aligned with OJK regulatory requirements, covering anti-corruption and governance frameworks.
Independent IT security assessment and penetration testing for digital banking platforms, with remediation roadmap development and board-level reporting.
ISO 27001 Internal Auditor certification training for 50 IT personnel, with practical workshops on audit planning, execution, and reporting.
Group-wide Quality Management System harmonization across 12 subsidiary companies, achieving unified ISO 9001:2015 certification.
National cybersecurity maturity assessment using NIST CSF framework, covering critical information infrastructure across government agencies.
Compliance management framework development and gap analysis for regulatory compliance across food manufacturing and distribution operations.
Agile IT governance and risk management bootcamp for engineering leads, covering modern frameworks tailored to high-growth technology environments.
Information security management implementation for pharmaceutical data systems, ensuring patient data protection and regulatory compliance.
